expected_effect: Improve raw screen mean edge by moving more fee onto the inventory-worsening side while modestly easing the inventory-rebalancing side.
rationale: Literature suggests dynamic fees should respond to inventory and external price changes, and market-making control suggests shifting quotes around a reservation price instead of widening symmetrically. Add a deadbanded side skew using divergence memory plus recent price change.
title: Deadbanded inventory reservation skew
